name: Potato and Egg Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sour cream                         1/2 teaspoon Chopped parsley
3/4 cup Shredded sharp cheddar cheese      Salt and pepper to taste
2 medium Potatoes, cooked peeled and        1 package Graham cracker tarts (6)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter until translucent.
2. Blend in flour and cook at medium heat for a few minutes.
3. Stir in sour cream, shredded cheddar cheese, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Layer potato slices evenly in the tarts.
5. Spread half of the sour cream mixture over the potatoes.
6. Arrange tomato and egg slices on top of the sour cream layer.
7. Cover with the remaining potato slices and continue spreading with the sour cream mixture.
8. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly across the top.
9. Bake for 40-45 minutes at 350°F until golden brown and bubbly.
10. Before serving, decorate with tomato and egg wedges.
